headline: Should Coca-Cola’s Fairlife Expansion And ESG Scrutiny Require Action From Coca-Cola (KO) Investors?
summary: In March 2026, Coca-Cola disclosed a wave of shareholder proposals on sustainability, plastics, DEI and product-ingredient risks ahead of its April 29 annual meeting, while also announcing long-serving director Maria Elena Lagomasino will retire from the board after 18 years. At the same time, Coca-Cola committed up to US$650,000,000 to expand Fairlife production in Michigan and New York, reinforcing investor attention on how its capital allocation, product mix and sustainability reporting...
